welcome.title: Welcome, {{name}}!
welcome.description: You're all set up. Start by placing your first booking — we'll guide you through every step from booking to delivery.

steps.preorder: Start here! Click New Booking to place a shipment request. We'll handle the logistics from Korea to your door.
steps.shipments: Track all your shipments in one place. See real-time status, tracking numbers, and delivery estimates.
steps.orders: View and manage your shipments. Check payment status, warehouse verification, and booking details.
steps.deliverySchedule: Check upcoming deliveries and estimated arrival dates. Plan ahead with the delivery calendar.
steps.language: Switch between English and Korean anytime. The entire dashboard will update instantly.
steps.profile: Access your account settings, view your role, and sign out from here.
